name: Friendica
description: Full-featured social network (Facebook-like). PHP-FPM version for better performance, requires Nginx.

related_services.name: web
related_services.description: Nginx web server for Friendica FPM
command: sleep 5 && echo 'server { listen 80; root /var/www/html; index index.php; location / { try_files $$uri $$uri/ /index.php?$$args; } location ~ \.php$ { fastcgi_pass ${friendica}:9000; include fastcgi_params; fastcgi_param SCRIPT_FILENAME $$document_root$$fastcgi_script_name; fastcgi_param HTTP_HOST $$http_host; fastcgi_param HTTP_X_FORWARDED_HOST $$http_host; fastcgi_param SERVER_NAME $$host; fastcgi_param SERVER_PORT $$server_port; fastcgi_param REMOTE_ADDR $$remote_addr; } }' > /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf && nginx -g 'daemon off;'
